induced_prompt_raw: Write five sentences with the pattern: "the [noun] the [noun] [transitive verb] [intransitive verb]" in the past tense.
induced_prompt: Write five sentences with the pattern: "the [noun] the [noun] [transitive verb] [intransitive verb]" in the past tense.
l2_sentences: The cat the girl chased slept.
The car the man bought stalled.
The letter the woman wrote arrived.

The phone the student dropped rang.
